content.query:
-- Create View Calendar
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE VIEW gold.calendar
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET
( 
    BULK 'https://akhilawstoragedatalake.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Calendar/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS QUERY1

-- Create View Customers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE VIEW gold.Customers
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET
( 
    BULK 'https://akhilawstoragedatalake.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Customers/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS QUERY2
